speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Habits and exceptions
questions: What do you usually do in the evening?
What are you doing differently today?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I usually watch TV in the evening. Today, I am studying English instead. Yes, my routine changes sometimes on weekends.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Review — Cooking right now

cueCard.topic: Describe what you are cooking or preparing right now.
bullets: how much or how many you have of it
what you are doing with it right now
and explain whether you enjoy cooking

speaking.sampleAnswer: I have some rice and a few vegetables for dinner. I have plenty of rice, but I don't have any meat. I am cooking some soup right now. I enjoy cooking because it is relaxing.
